case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,381.57 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR. $1,381.57 PRINCIPAL, $40.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,422.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR. HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JAN-11-1993 AS TO DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF FEB-17-1993, CONTINUED FROM FEB-17-1993 TO MAR-10-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06 AS TO DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-10-1993, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM MAR-10-1993 TO MAR-24-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06 AS TO DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-24-1993, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR.
BENCH LETTER WAS RETURNED, PLT TO FURNISH NEW & CORRECT ADDRESS.
FAILURE TO APPEAR FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION FOR MARCOS ALCONTIN JR. RETURN NO SUCH NUMBER
DEFT'S NEW ADDRESS IS 150 HAROLD AVE. #B S.F. CA 94112.
BENCH LETTER SET FOR MAY 5 1993 SENT TO DEFT'S NEW ADDRESS. BOTH PARTIES NOTIFIED.
DEFT. N/A ORD. ARREST TO ISSUE BAIL $500.00.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALCONTIN MARCOS A. JR.
